prompts: Japanese fantasy RPG guild forge, warm wood, soft lamplight. Yuna Starling, an androgynous healer in cream and mint robes, steadies a shield on the workbench while Yuna Mistfell, a masculine crafter in a rolled-sleeve apron and tool belt, guides a safe repair tool. Cooperative hands, calm atmosphere, no sparks, no text, no watermark.

Same continuous forge shot, same characters and lighting. Yuna Mistfell taps the final harmless repair mark on the shield while Yuna Starling continues to hold it steady. Friendly teamwork, clear tool motion, warm workshop aesthetic, no text, no watermark.
